73797.subject: Claude Just Changed the Economics of Enterprise AI
73797.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/claude-just-changed-economics-enterprise-ai-genai-works-1xvhe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B5I2itqYDSReQVoP1zL6eEw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1OxOZE8j0qIIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpr4ks35~ag-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpr4ks35-ag
  
Welcome back! This week, the new question is: What happens when AI starts doing the work? Anthropic answered that with Claude's new Dynamic Workflows feature. At the same time, Anthropic published a practical playbook showing how financial services firms are already using Claude across different operations. Google DeepMind attacked a different bottleneck: knowledge access. Gemini Embedding 2 promises to make digital assets searchable through a single retrieval layer, reducing both AI costs and operational complexity. And while companies race to deploy AI, China reminded the industry that infrastructure still matters. Beijing effectively closed one of Nvidia's remaining doors in China, redirecting future AI spending toward domestic suppliers. In today's Atlas Newsletter: Dynamic Workflows: How can Claude help your team finish projects in days instead of months? Finance teams & Claude: Six ways financial services firms are accelerating their most time-consuming work. China bans Nvidia: Why did Beijing redirect hundreds of millions in AI chip spending toward domestic suppliers? Gemini Embedding 2: How is Google reducing the cost and complexity of enterprise AI search? PS: Want to share your AI tool or company news with our 14M+ community? Get in touch. How can Claude help you finish your projects in days instead of months? If your enterprise is struggling with a backlog of technical work that never seems to move fast enough, you might consider Claude Dynamic Workflows. The idea behind this feature is simple. Instead of one AI agent working through a task step by step, Dynamic Workflows launches tens or even hundreds of parallel subagents. Some execute the work. Others review it, challenge assumptions, and look for errors. The rest verify the results before they are returned. The process runs continuously, saves progress automatically, and resumes exactly where it stopped if interrupted. For CTOs and engineering leaders, the economics are becoming difficult to ignore. Projects that once required large teams and multi-month timelines can now be completed faster, at lower cost, and with less disruption to ongoing work. The bottleneck has moved from team capacity to deciding which problem to solve first. What's most interesting is that, in one of our previous editions, we predicted that Claude would soon launch a Dynamic Workflows feature. Subscribe to r

73794.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-may-29-oleh-bezuhlyi-2bzof?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BOa6QpIGpQmy8P9xDSz2bvw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0SHHJDKEcaIIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpr4bbsp~4r-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpr4bbsp-4r
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: The market is defined by a massive institutional power shift as BlackRock’s IBIT becomes the world's largest Bitcoin ETF. Despite Mt. Gox-induced volatility, ecosystem expansion through PayPal and Mastercard signals deepening mainstream integration. 🏛️BlackRock’s IBIT Overtakes Grayscale as World’s Largest Bitcoin ETF BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) has officially flipped Grayscale’s GBTC, ending the latter's decade-long reign as the largest crypto fund. IBIT now holds nearly $20 billion in assets, marking a decisive victory for traditional finance giants in the digital asset space. Read full story 🚨Mt. Gox Transfers $9.6 Billion in Bitcoin for Repayment Preparation Wallets associated with the defunct Mt. Gox exchange moved over 141,000 BTC to a new address for the first time in five years. This massive consolidation is part of the rehabilitation trustee’s plan to begin repaying creditors, causing temporary sell-side pressure on Bitcoin’s price. See details 💳Mastercard Launches "Crypto Credential" for Global P2P Transactions Mastercard has gone live with its peer-to-peer crypto transfer service, replacing complex wallet addresses with user-friendly aliases. The system integrates with major exchanges like Bit2Me and Mercado Bitcoin to ensure compliant, cross-border digital asset movement. Read full story 🌐PayPal Expands PYUSD Stablecoin to Solana for Faster Payments PayPal has launched its dollar-backed stablecoin, PYUSD, on the Solana blockchain to leverage its high speed and low transaction costs. This expansion aims to move the stablecoin beyond trading and into mainstream retail and enterprise payment use cases. See details 💰Semler Scientific Adopts Bitcoin as Primary Treasury Reserve Medical technology firm Semler Scientific has followed MicroStrategy’s lead, purchasing 581 BTC and declaring Bitcoin its primary treasury asset. The move sparked a 25% surge in the company’s stock price, highlighting growing corporate appetite for "digital gold." Read full story 📈SEC Begins Reviewing S-1 Forms for Spot Ethereum ETFs Following the surprise approval of Ethereum 19b-4 filings last week, the SEC has reportedly begun providing feedback on issuers' S-1 registration statements. While trading has not yet commenced, the fast-tracked feedback loop suggests a potential launch within weeks. See details

73792.subject: The Oil Shock is Not Over. Here's What Comes Next.
73792.body:
VanEck Investment Insights

Автор: VanEck


Автор: VanEck

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/oil-shock-over-heres-what-comes-next-vaneck-ausre?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BwRiBJmyORNq73%2BhnppUzlg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1MBqeElAjFIsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpr35epg~qg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpr35epg-qg
  
Oil markets are facing pressures that go beyond a typical geopolitical spike. A deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz may be near in the future. However, the oil market has already been fundamentally changed. Months of supply disruption have drained inventories, raised shipping costs, and exposed a lack of spare capacity. We'll discuss why oil prices may stay elevated for longer and what growing energy demand from AI and global infrastructure means for investors considering energy exposure today. TOPICS Understand why current supply disruptions may represent a longer-term structural shift rather than a short-lived price spike Explore how rising demand from AI, electrification, and global infrastructure is reinforcing the investment case for oil Learn what to look for in energy companies that may be better positioned in this environment  Watch Now Important Disclosures Please note that VanEck may offer investment products that invest in the asset class(es) or industries included in this webinar. This is not an offer to buy or sell, or a recommendation to buy or sell any of the securities, financial instruments or digital assets mentioned herein. The information presented does not involve the rendering of personalized investment, financial, legal, tax advice, or any call to action. Certain statements contained herein may constitute projections, forecasts and other forward-looking statements, which do not reflect actual results, are for illustrative purposes only, are valid as of the date of this communication, and are subject to change without notice. Actual future performance of any assets or industries mentioned are unknown. Information provided by third party sources are believed to be reliable and have not been independently verified for accuracy or completeness and cannot be guaranteed. VanEck does not guarantee the accuracy of third party data. The information herein represents the opinion of the author(s), but not necessarily those of VanEck or its other employees. All investing is subject to risk, including the possible loss of the money you invest. As with any investment strategy, there is no guarantee that investment objectives will be met and investors may lose money. Diversification does not ensure a profit or protect against a loss in a declining market. Past performance is no guarantee of future results. © 2026 Van Eck Associates Corporatio

73791.subject: Potvrdenie rezervácie - NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness
73791.body: Bookio. Dobrý deň p. Oleh Novosadov, Potvrdzujeme týmto Vašu rezerváciu v NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness . Detail rezervácie Dátum a čas: 29.5.2026, 17:30 Rezervácia na meno: Oleh Novosadov Služba: 2 hodinový vstup Doba trvania: 2h Cena: 68 € Počet osôb 2 Pridať do kalendára Google kalendár , Iné (iCal, Outlook,...) Viete o našich permanentkách? Nahoď si kartu NOVA20 za 240 EUR (NOVA10 za 140€). Je oproti bežnému jednorazovému vstupu o 50% lacnejšia, prenosná a teda použiteľná pre celú rodinu alebo kolektív, platná celých 365 dní od aktivácie. Dostupné aj online. Pri kúpe naživo aj s bonusom a krásnym balením. Ako jediný košický prémiový wellness sme tu pre Vás 360 dní v roku, 7 dní v týždni, od 9:00 do 21:00 v 100% kvalite. Váš tím NOVA SPA. Ak chcete zrušiť Vašu rezerváciu, kliknete Zrušiť rezerváciu Kde nás nájdete? NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness , Žriedlová 11, 04001 Košice-Staré Mesto Ukáž na mape +421911463729 recepcia@novaspa.sk https://www.novaspa.sk Vaše údaje Oleh Novosadov +421951292548 novosadovoleg@gmail.com Tešíme sa na Vašu návštevu a prajeme Vám pekný deň. Vedeli ste, že v NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness môžete kúpiť aj Darčekové poukážky Rezervačný systém Bookio.sk © 2024 Bookio. Všetky práva vyhradené.
